items: Welcome by the School Board President

Oral Communication - (for items not on the Regular Board Agenda) If you have public comment related to a Regular Session item, please post it on this link (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Approval of Construction Agreement with Fremont Millworks for Roosevelt School's Building E Casework
Measure T Bond Program Budget Study, Update, and Adoption
Approval of Construction Agreements with FE Controls for 2950 Fair Oaks Avenue Site
Discussion of Temporary Rule: Paid Leave Under the Families First Coronavirus Response Act (FFCRA or ACT)
Approval of Connect Community Charter School Preliminary Space Offer

llmResponse.consent_vote_words: So I have a motion to approve. So moved. I'll second it.
